prompt: Modern living room interior photography. Four glossy metal art panels arranged in a neat 2x2 grid on a light grey wall. Each panel is a different colour scheme: one blue, one dark, one warm red and gold, one navy and white. The panels float off the wall with subtle shadows. Below them is a modern grey fabric sofa. A brass floor lamp stands to the right. Warm natural window lighting. Clean aspirational home decor. Interior design magazine style photography. 4K.
